response:
CANDIDATE_PARTIAL: all x.(HoldingCompany(x) -> exists y.(Hold(x, y)))
CANDIDATE_OVERWEAK: exists x.(HoldingCompany(x) -> exists y.(Company(y) & Hold(x, y)))
CANDIDATE_OVERSTRONG: all x.(HoldingCompany(x) -> exists y.(Company(y) & Hold(x, y) & HoldingCompany(y)))
CANDIDATE_GIBBERISH: all x.(Company(x) -> exists y.(HoldingCompany(y) & Hold(y, x)))
